title: Fortnite
info: Feudal Gotham’s Dark Night, Ninja Knight Batman, and the malicious wildcard Karuta Harley Quinn strike with a vengeance.

title: Fortnite 2
info: BANG! Take your shot with bounty hunters Spike Spiegel and Faye Valentine from COWBOY BEBOP.

title: Fortnite 3
